nasb.text: Moreover the hand of the Lord was against them, to destroy them from within the camp until they all perished.

esv.text: For indeed the hand of the Lord was against them, to destroy them from the camp, until they had perished.

cnv.text: 耶和華的手攻擊了他們，把他們從營中除滅，直到滅盡為止。

ccb.text: 其实是耶和华的手攻击他们，直到把他们从营中全部消灭。
